name: tokenfly
description: A lightweight npm package and CLI to estimate prompt token usage and costs.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --tsconfig tsconfig.json && tsup src/bin.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist --clean false --tsconfig tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const file='dist/bin.js';const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');if(!content.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')) fs.writeFileSync(file,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+content);"
